sections.title: Types of scholarships / Tipos de becas
sections.content:
BECAS PARA ESTUDIANTES / SCHOLARSHIP FOR STUDENTS

- Beca del gobierno ruso (cuota estatal) / Scholarship under the quota of the Government of the Russian Federation
- Beca académica por buenas notas / Academic scholarship for academic performance
- Beca social / Social scholarship

CUOTA ESTATAL / STATE QUOTA (Rossotrudnichestvo):
- Matrícula gratuita / Free training
- Beca mensual / Monthly stipend
- Plaza en residencia / Place in a dormitory
Solicitud / Application: education-in-russia.com (Selection)
